findings.title: cTrader Forum - What's New in cTrader Automate API 3.5
findings.description: Dear traders, We would like to inform you that we have released cTrader Desktop v3.5! Below you can find the new features included in cTrader Automate API 3.5. Access to all symbols Now you can get all the symbols available in the platform using Symbols property.

findings.title: Getting started - Open API - cTrader Help Centre
findings.description: A Telegram bot that automatically informs your followers of any new trades you may have placed. An app for wearables that displays the current P&L of the five most recent positions opened by the user. A mobile app that gives a market overview by using a generative AI service. As you can see, cTr

findings.title: cTrader Forum - New Features in cTrader Automate API 3.7
findings.description: As cTrader 3.7 introduces new smooth chart zooming, zoom values in API was changed. Old Chart.Zoom property is deprecated. It used to have range of possible values from 0 to 5, which reflected old zoom levels on the user interface. New Chart.ZoomLevel was added with values from 5 to

findings.title: cTrader Open API
findings.description: Integrate cTrader Open API into your website or app to allow users to trade or manage their cTrader accounts without leaving your platform.

findings.title: Spotware Unveils cTrader 5.1: The Most Powerful Upgrade Yet - TradeInformer
findings.description: The Windows version of cTrader 5.1 takes algorithmic trading to the next level. Users can now install and compile algorithm files directly through the API, streamlining workflows and boosting efficiency. Meanwhile, enhanced file management tools, including OpenFileDialog, OpenFolderDialog, and SaveF

findings.title: CTrader: 7 Must-Know Features for Successful Trading in 2025
findings.description: Discover the top features of CTrader for seamless trading. Learn how this platform's tools and automation help you trade smarter and faster.

findings.title: cTrader Integration Brings Social Trading to South African CFD Broker Swyft Markets — TradingView News
findings.description: Yiota Hadjilouka, chief operating officer of cTrader, said the platform provides technology “tailored to the needs of both newcomers and professionals.” The update also adds social trading features and other broker services.

findings.title: Google Ads API Version 23.1 Now Out
findings.description: Google has released a minor version update to the Google Ads API, version 23.1. This update has changes to account management, campaigns, conversions, incentives, planning, reporting and more.

findings.title: cTrader Open API 2.0 Released: Faster Apps with More Features
findings.description: cTrader Open API v2.0 is the successor ... performance of apps and providing them with more functionality. ... cTrader Open API v2.0 will not feature any REST web services for account information retrieval....

findings.title: cTrader Admin 9.9: Email tracking and new Workspace app
findings.description: Spotware releases cTrader Admin 9.9 with email tracking in Sessions, a new Workspace settings app and a collapsible main menu, improving daily platform administration and ensuring consistent operational control.
